concerns.detail: Unsupported psychiatric diagnosis (NPD) and sweeping character assassination without reference to concrete advising behaviors
concerns.excerpt: 极端npd人格，看人下菜，嘴里没一句实话，平等恶心所有人

concerns.detail: Personal attack on another commenter using insults ('舔', 'phd念的太舒服了') rather than engaging with the substantive claims about the advisor
concerns.excerpt: 哥们在manling三个黑点下面一直舔是什么鬼，是不是phd念的太舒服了不知道人间疾苦
